description: Code Switch R: Manage Claude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI vendor switching, proxy, MCP and usage statistics
notes: Claude / Codex / Gemini configs at %USERPROFILE%\.claude\, %USERPROFILE%\.codex\, %USERPROFILE%\.gemini\ are not managed by this package
Persists .code-switch-R via Scoop persist for backup/migration
Recommend disabling auto-update in app settings to avoid conflicts with Scoop
